issue: Frontend dashboard task pulls 9 rules including the entire Vendure/NestJS backend set. PR2 correctly keeps both ecosystems selected at recommend time (mixed repo legitimately needs both), but the task router cannot isolate the storefront task from the backend rules.
expected: "build dashboard route" should narrow to haus.nextjs-patterns + haus.react19-patterns + haus.typescript6-patterns. Vendure/NestJS rules should drop for this task.
rootCauseHypothesis: Same as laravel-with-react-backend-task-bleed: no ecosystem-aware task routing. "build shipping plugin" correctly narrows to vendure-plugin (single id-token hit), but "build dashboard route" has no matching id token in the selected set, so the fallback returns everything.
